defmodule CaravelaDemoWeb.Schema.LibraryMutations do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  Absinthe mutations for every entity. For each entity:

    * `create_<singular>` — accepts a typed input object
    * `update_<singular>` — takes id + typed input
    * `delete_<singular>` — takes id, returns the removed entity

  All mutations delegate to the generated context module, which
  enforces authorization and lifecycle hooks.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.graphql CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  use Absinthe.Schema.Notation

  alias CaravelaDemo.Library

  input_object :author_input do
    field :name, non_null(:string)
    field :bio, :string
    field :born, :date
  end

  input_object :book_input do
    field :title, non_null(:string)
    field :isbn, :string
    field :published, :boolean
    field :price, :decimal
  end

  input_object :publisher_input do
    field :name, non_null(:string)
    field :country, :string
  end

  object :library_mutations do
    @desc "Create a author"
    field :create_author, :author do
      arg(:input, non_null(:author_input))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{input: input}, resolution ->
        case Library.create_author(input, extract_context(resolution)) do
          {:ok, entity} -> {:ok, entity}
          {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Update a author"
    field :update_author, :author do
      arg(:id, non_null(:id))
      arg(:input, non_null(:author_input))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{id: id, input: input}, resolution ->
        context = extract_context(resolution)

        case Library.get_author(id, context) do
          nil ->
            {:error, "not_found"}

          entity ->
            case Library.update_author(entity, input, context) do
              {:ok, updated} -> {:ok, updated}
              {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
            end
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Delete a author"
    field :delete_author, :author do
      arg(:id, non_null(:id))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{id: id}, resolution ->
        context = extract_context(resolution)

        case Library.get_author(id, context) do
          nil ->
            {:error, "not_found"}

          entity ->
            case Library.delete_author(entity, context) do
              {:ok, removed} -> {:ok, removed}
              {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
            end
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Create a book"
    field :create_book, :book do
      arg(:input, non_null(:book_input))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{input: input}, resolution ->
        case Library.create_book(input, extract_context(resolution)) do
          {:ok, entity} -> {:ok, entity}
          {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Update a book"
    field :update_book, :book do
      arg(:id, non_null(:id))
      arg(:input, non_null(:book_input))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{id: id, input: input}, resolution ->
        context = extract_context(resolution)

        case Library.get_book(id, context) do
          nil ->
            {:error, "not_found"}

          entity ->
            case Library.update_book(entity, input, context) do
              {:ok, updated} -> {:ok, updated}
              {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
            end
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Delete a book"
    field :delete_book, :book do
      arg(:id, non_null(:id))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{id: id}, resolution ->
        context = extract_context(resolution)

        case Library.get_book(id, context) do
          nil ->
            {:error, "not_found"}

          entity ->
            case Library.delete_book(entity, context) do
              {:ok, removed} -> {:ok, removed}
              {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
            end
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Create a publisher"
    field :create_publisher, :publisher do
      arg(:input, non_null(:publisher_input))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{input: input}, resolution ->
        case Library.create_publisher(input, extract_context(resolution)) do
          {:ok, entity} -> {:ok, entity}
          {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Update a publisher"
    field :update_publisher, :publisher do
      arg(:id, non_null(:id))
      arg(:input, non_null(:publisher_input))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{id: id, input: input}, resolution ->
        context = extract_context(resolution)

        case Library.get_publisher(id, context) do
          nil ->
            {:error, "not_found"}

          entity ->
            case Library.update_publisher(entity, input, context) do
              {:ok, updated} -> {:ok, updated}
              {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
            end
        end
      end)
    end

    @desc "Delete a publisher"
    field :delete_publisher, :publisher do
      arg(:id, non_null(:id))

      resolve(fn _parent, %{id: id}, resolution ->
        context = extract_context(resolution)

        case Library.get_publisher(id, context) do
          nil ->
            {:error, "not_found"}

          entity ->
            case Library.delete_publisher(entity, context) do
              {:ok, removed} -> {:ok, removed}
              {:error, reason} -> {:error, format_error(reason)}
            end
        end
      end)
    end
  end

  # --- Internal --------------------------------------------------------

  defp extract_context(%{context: context}) when is_map(context), do: context
  defp extract_context(_), do: %{}

  defp format_error(:unauthorized), do: "unauthorized"
  defp format_error(%Ecto.Changeset{} = cs), do: inspect(cs.errors)
  defp format_error(other), do: inspect(other)

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

defmodule CaravelaDemoWeb.Schema.LibraryTypes do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  Absinthe object types for every entity in the domain. Relations are
  resolved via Dataloader.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.graphql CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  use Absinthe.Schema.Notation
  import Absinthe.Resolution.Helpers, only: [dataloader: 1]

  @desc "A author"
  object :author do
    field :id, non_null(:id)
    field :name, non_null(:string)
    field :bio, :string
    field :born, :date
    field :books, list_of(:book), resolve: dataloader(CaravelaDemo.Library)
  end

  @desc "A book"
  object :book do
    field :id, non_null(:id)
    field :title, non_null(:string)
    field :isbn, :string
    field :published, :boolean
    field :price, :decimal
    field :author, :author, resolve: dataloader(CaravelaDemo.Library)
    field :publisher, :publisher, resolve: dataloader(CaravelaDemo.Library)
  end

  @desc "A publisher"
  object :publisher do
    field :id, non_null(:id)
    field :name, non_null(:string)
    field :country, :string
    field :books, list_of(:book), resolve: dataloader(CaravelaDemo.Library)
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end
